title: IIIT Hyderabad PGEE Admit Card 2026

detail.title: IIIT Hyderabad PGEE Admit Card 2026
detail.short_info: IIIT Hyderabad PGEE Admit Card 2026 released at pgadmissions.iiit.ac.in. Download PGEE hall ticket for MTech, MS, PhD; check exam date 2 May 2026, timing 2 PM–5 PM, and key exam‑day instructions.

content.text: The International Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad (IIIT‑H) has released the IIIT Hyderabad PGEE Admit Card 2026 for the Postgraduate Entrance Examination (PGEE) for admission to MTech, MS by Research and PhD programmes. Registered candidates can download their PGEE hall ticket from the official PG admissions portal, pgadmissions.iiit.ac.in, using their login credentials.
As per the official schedule, the IIITH PGEE 2026 exam will be conducted on 2 May 2026 in online (computer‑based) mode from 2:00 PM to 5:00 PM.
Click Here: IIIT Hyderabad PGEE Admit Card 2026 Out for MTech, MS

links.text: IIIT Hyderabad PGEE Admit Card 2026 Out for MTech, MS

sections.heading: IIIT Hyderabad PGEE Admit Card 2026 - Overview

rows: International Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad (IIIT-H)
MTech, MS by Research, PhD in various engineering and computing disciplines
PGEE 2026 admit card released around 10 days before exam

sections.heading: IIIT Hyderabad PGEE Admit Card 2026 Download Link

content.text: IIIT Hyderabad has activated the PGEE admit card download link on the official PG admissions portal. Candidates who completed the PGEE 2026 registration and fee payment can log in and download their IIITH PGEE Admit Card 2026 in PDF format.

The admit card must be printed clearly and carried to the exam centre, as it serves as the primary entry document and contains the candidate’s roll number, exam centre, date and detailed instructions.

sections.heading: How to Download IIIT Hyderabad PGEE Admit Card 2026

content.text: Candidates can follow these steps to download the IIITH PGEE 2026 hall ticket:

items: Visit the official PG admissions portal: pgadmissions.iiit.ac.in.
On the homepage, click on the link labelled “PGEE 2026 Admit Card / Hall Ticket” or similar.
Enter your User ID / registered email and password used during PGEE registration.
After logging in, the IIIT Hyderabad PGEE Admit Card 2026 will be displayed on the screen.
Check all details carefully (name, roll number, exam date, centre, instructions) and then download the PDF.
Take one or more printouts of the admit card to carry on the exam day.

content.text: In case of any error or mismatch in the hall ticket, candidates must immediately contact the IIIT Hyderabad PG admissions office using the contact details provided on the PG portal.

sections.heading: IIITH PGEE 2026 Exam Date, Time and Pattern

content.text: IIIT Hyderabad will conduct the PGEE 2026 exam on 2 May 2026 from 2:00 PM to 5:00 PM. The examination will be held online and will include both objective and subjective questions depending on the chosen stream.

items: Exam date: 2 May 2026
Exam time: 2:00 PM to 5:00 PM (single shift)
Mode: Online computer‑based test
Question types: Mix of multiple‑choice and descriptive questions as per discipline syllabus

content.text: Candidates must refer to the official PGEE syllabus and pattern for their specific programme (e.g., CSE, ECE, AI, Data Science) as mentioned in the detailed information brochure.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on IIIT Hyderabad PGEE Admit Card 2026

content.text: The PGEE 2026 admit card carries several important details which candidates must verify before the exam:

items: Candidate’s name and photograph
User ID / application number / roll number
Exam name: IIITH PGEE 2026
Programme / discipline applied for (MTech / MS / PhD)
Exam date: 2 May 2026
Exam timing: 2:00 PM to 5:00 PM
Exam centre name and full address
Reporting time and gate‑closing time (if specified)
Important instructions, items allowed/prohibited, and COVID/safety guidelines (if applicable)

content.text: Any discrepancy in these details should be reported early so that the institute can resolve it before exam day.

sections.heading: Documents Required with IIIT Hyderabad PGEE Admit Card 2026

content.text: On the day of PGEE 2026, candidates must carry the following to the exam centre:

items: A printed copy of the IIIT Hyderabad PGEE Admit Card 2026
One original, valid government‑issued photo ID such as: Aadhaar Card PAN Card Passport Voter ID Driving Licence
Aadhaar Card
PAN Card
Passport
Voter ID
Driving Licence
Additional passport‑size photograph(s), if specified in instructions or for use on attendance sheets

content.text: Candidates without a valid admit card and acceptable ID proof will not be allowed to enter the exam hall.
IIIT Hyderabad has laid down certain exam‑day instructions for PGEE 2026 that candidates must follow strictly:

items: Reach the exam centre well before reporting time to complete verification, frisking and seating.
Carry only necessary items such as admit card, ID proof and permitted stationery.
Do not bring prohibited items like mobile phones, smart watches, calculators, Bluetooth devices or any electronic gadgets into the exam hall.
Follow invigilators’ instructions carefully and maintain discipline throughout the exam.
Any involvement in unfair practices or malpractice can lead to cancellation of the candidate’s exam and disqualification from the admission process.
